label: memory • seeded specifics beat plausible-sounding generic answers
query: Which slip is my boat moored at? Answer with just the slip.
notes: Anti-generic pin: 'slip 14' is arbitrary enough that a model can only get it from memory — a plausible guess (slip 1, A-dock…) fails. Complements pinned-fact-recall by demanding the SPECIFIC detail, not the memorable name. Off-CI (needs a model).

pinnedFacts: The user's sailboat is named Peregrine Dusk and is moored at slip 14 of Greywater Marina.
